sections.paragraph:
and עֶצֶב m.-

(1) an earthen vessel, Jer 22:28, see Kal No. 1.

(2) heavy and toilsome labour, Pro 10:22. Pl. עֲצָבִים labours, i.e. things done with toil, Prov. 5:10 , לֶחֶם הָעֲצָבִים “bread obtained by toilsome labour;” Psa 127:2.

(3) pain, such as of parturient women, Gen 3:16 also grief of mind, anger, Pro 15:1, דְּבַּר עֶצֶב “a word pronounced with anger,” a bitter, sharp word.
